exercises.title: Bound Calculator
exercises.description: Implement functions to calculate various coding bounds.
tasks: Calculate sphere volume V(n, t)
Implement Hamming bound for maximum k
Implement Singleton bound
Check if code achieves perfect (Hamming equality)
Check if code is MDS (Singleton equality)

exercises.title: Perfect Code Finder
exercises.description: Find all perfect codes within given parameter ranges.
tasks: Search for perfect codes with n ≤ 31
Verify found codes satisfy Hamming equality exactly
Identify Hamming codes in the results
Check for the Golay code parameters
Report all perfect code parameters found
exercises.expectedOutput: List of all binary perfect codes
hints: Known perfect codes: trivial, Hamming, Golay

exercises.title: Shannon Capacity Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze Shannon capacity and compare with actual codes.
tasks: Implement binary entropy function H₂(p)
Calculate BSC capacity for various error rates
Compare capacity to rates of known codes
Calculate gap to capacity for specific codes
Plot rate vs error probability achievability

exercises.title: Quantum vs Classical Bounds
exercises.description: Compare classical and quantum coding bounds.
tasks: Implement quantum Singleton bound
Implement quantum Hamming bound (with 3^i factor)
Compare maximum k for classical vs quantum codes
Verify known quantum codes satisfy bounds
Find smallest n for [[n, 1, 3]] quantum code
hints: Quantum sphere: V_Q = Σ 3^i × C(n, i)
Quantum needs more qubits for same k, d
